chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-947 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 1, 22 & 23. 2. For hearing of CMA 5033/2025. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Wasif Khan, advocate holds brief for Rana Azam-ul-Hassan, advocate for the petitioner. Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for respondent 3. Mr. M. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Prima facie, this petition assails a show cause notice and it is settled law that such notices are not ordinarily generated in writ jurisdiction. Be that as it may, on the last date a brief was held for the petitioner’s counsel and time sought and same is the case today; therefore, petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
